periodic_spectral.note: H^-1 residual norm (rule's variationally-correct path for periodic+spectral poisson). BDO norm-equivalence: ||r||_{H-1} is proportional to ||u_pert - u_exact||_{H1} within a bounded ratio (C_max/c_min < 10) across the three-mode family.

nonperiodic_fd.note: L^2 fallback per ph_res_001.py:123-131; ratio ||r||_{L2} / ||.||_{H1} scales linearly with perturbation wavenumber k because ||Laplacian f||_{L2} / ||f||_{H1} is proportional to k for f = sin(k pi x) sin(k pi y). This is a characterization of the rule's L^2 fallback, not a test of norm-equivalence.
